ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-28-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-28-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Continued To Aug-28-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Terrence Murphy for Eric Ringer.

Mr. Murphy stated that he tried to file a substitution yesterday, that it got kicked back and that he will re-submit it today. Mr. Murphy also stated that there is a judicial foreclosure action pending, that he thinks the trial is set for the third Monday in August, that mediation is set for July 24, 2018 and asked for a continuance to a date after the trial. The Court noted that there is no appearance by Mr. Ringer and Attorney Diana Evans, and that an order to appear had been issued to both of them. Mr. Murphy stated that he spoke with Counsel early on, that he has not been able to speak with her since, and that he is aware of what is needed, but he needs to look at the file. In addition, Mr. Murphy stated that the asset is a single residence on 26th and Kirkham, that Mr. Ringer started a new position with the Post Office and could not be here, and that the substitution of attorney filed by Ms. Evans shows a P.O. Box address in Sacramento. Status on close of estate and the order to appear are continued to August 28, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing of a petition for final distribution.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Continued To Aug-28-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-29-2018 Continued To Jun-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the prior Attorney to appear on June 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. Ms. Evans provided incorrect information at the last hearing. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Continued To May-29-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diana Evans for Eric Ringer

Ms. Evans stated that her client's family wants to keep the estate open, was asked to come in today to request a continuance, the family has a new attorney who needs time to review the file, and she has submitted a Substitution of Attorney. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to May 29, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Continued To May-01-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diana Evans for Eric Ringer

Ms. Evans stated that she did not receive the first Order to Appear, assuming that it must have gone to her old office, and that she didn't do anything in this case after it was opened after they found a Trust. The Order to Appear is Off Calendar. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to May 1, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of appropriate petition to close estate or a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Continued To Apr-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on April 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the petition for close of estate has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Shirley Le. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)
